archivedReason: Superseded by Stage1 (Boundary Freeze + Agent Runtime Skeleton) and Stage1-CLOSE. The legacy multi-model platform path this plan tracked (DecisionHubFacade, golden runner, MockProvider) has been @Deprecated and replaced by the agent runtime skeleton under domain.research/agent/candidate/judge/experience/feedback + usecase.agent + memory.agent + eval.agent + connector.nq. Steps 4-7 were never executed and are intentionally left as historical record.
